speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: flood of emotions
text: Main subah se itna ro rahi hoon ki dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai... is flood of emotions mein mujhe koi raasta nahi dikh raha. Bas lag raha hai sab khatam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the emotional overwhelm to validate the Seeker's state.
text: Tumhara dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai, aur is waqt ye flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki aage ka kuch bhi nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai
text: Haan, main saans bhi theek se nahi le pa rahi. Bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke. Meri bacchi bhi mujhe aise dekh rahi hai par main khud ko sambhal nahi pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the role and duty frame regarding her daughter.
text: Tum khud itni takleef mein ho, aur upar se ye darr bhi lag raha hai ki tumhari bacchi tumhe is haal mein dekh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha bacchi ko aaj school kaise bheju. Subah se uthne ki himmat nahi hui. Papa ne bhi bahut sunaya mujhe raat ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of Papa's anger.
text: Raat ko Papa ne tumhe bahut kuch sunaya, aur uske baad se tumhari bilkul himmat nahi ho rahi ki uth kar aage ka din shuru kar sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Papa ki galti nahi hai. Wo bhi thak gaye hain. Ek aur rishta toot gaya kal raat. Meri beti ko apnane se mana kar diya un logon ne. Main ek kalank ban gayi hoon sabke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement and soft pause.
text: Jab unhone tumhari beti ko apnane se mana kiya aur rishta toota, toh tumhe lag raha hai ki tum parivar par ek bojh ban gayi ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: flood of emotions
text: Bojh hi toh hoon. Ladke wale aate hain, sab theek lagta hai, aur phir achanak beti ka sun kar piche hat jate hain. Itna bura lagta hai ki is flood of emotions mein saans ghootne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question based on the suffocation feeling to explore further.
text: Aise baar baar aasha jag kar toot jana, is se jo saans ghootne jaisi takleef hoti hai, us waqt tumhare mann mein kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mann karta hai ki kahin door chali jaun. Par main single mother hoon, kahan jaungi? Papa sochte hain shaadi nahi hui toh society kya kahegi. Ye society ka darr hi mujhe kha raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma response to society comment with soft time/duration mirror.
text: Itne time se society aur as-paas ke logon ka darr sehte sehte tum andar hi andar akeli pad gayi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan akeli hi toh hoon. Koi samajhta nahi ki mera bachha meri weakness nahi hai. Par ladke wale toh usay luggage ki tarah dekhte hain. Ye dekh kar dil toot jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational frame of how prospective grooms view her daughter.
text: Jab koi tumhari sabse pyari bacchi ko kisi bojh ki tarah dekhta hai, toh wo dard bardaasht karna bohut mushkil ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut mushkil hai. Main roz khud ko samjhati hoon, kaam pe jati hoon, ghar aati hoon. Par raat aate aate sab bikhar jata hai. Ab toh rone ki himmat bhi khatam ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Identify the quiet resignation in the Seeker's words.
text: Lagta hai roz ye double zindagi jeete jeete tum bilkul thak chuki ho, aur ab andar ek chup si baith gayi hai jaise kuch badalne wala nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai
text: Sahi kaha. Kuch nahi badlega. Isliye toh dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai. Main bas chalti ja rahi hoon ek machine ki tarah kyunki beti ki responsibility hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the burden of being a single mother in this society.
text: Hamare yahan akele ek bacchi ko palna aur upar se samajh ke taane sunna, is sab mein kisi ka bhi machine ban jana laazmi hai; ye tumhari kamzori nahi, halaat ka bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi toh bola ki meri kamzori nahi hai. Ghar mein toh sab yahi sochte hain ki mujh mein hi koi khot hai isliye mera pichla rishta nahi tika aur ab naye bhi toot rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic anecdote about single mothers facing stigma.
text: Akele baccho ko palne wali maaon ke saath society mein hamesha aurat mein hi khot nikalna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki log kya kahenge ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Log bas baatein banana jante hain. Par mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main ab kya karoon? Bacchi school nahi gayi aaj, aur mera bhi kaam pe dhyan nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the immediate practical overwhelm.
text: Tumhe fikar ho rahi hai ki is sab chakkar mein tumhari beti ki padhai aur tumhara apna kaam, dono jagah nuksaan ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: flood of emotions
text: Haan, aur mujhe kuch theek karna hai. Abhi toh ro kar bas thak gayi hoon. Koi raasta hai kya, kuch batao ki is bheed aur flood of emotions se kaise niklu abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps fitting her role.
text: Abhi sirf agle ek ghante ka sochte hain. Ya toh ek glass paani pi kar apni bacchi ke paas baith jao bas usay dekhne, ya phir muh dho kar sirf do minute akele shant baith jao bina kisi soch ke. Kya lagta hai asaan abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Muh dho kar paani peena shayad theek rahega. Bacchi abhi thoda tv dekh rahi hai, main paas jaungi toh wo aur puchegi ki mummy kya hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide step-by-step for the chosen suggestion.
text: Pehle sirf ja kar thande paani se chehra dho lo... phir ek glass paani aaram se baith kar piyo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Jab ho jaye toh aana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine muh dho liya. Thoda halka lag raha hai dimaag. Par andar darr wahi hai ki shaam ko phir papa naye rishte ki baat na shuru kar de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural framing for her father's behavior.
text: Papa ki wo baatein isliye aati hain kyunki humari society mein buzurgon ko lagta hai ki bina aadmi ke aurat ki safety nahi hai; wo tumhari chinta mein jaldi machate hain, chahe tareeka galat ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan unka yahi darr hai. Bolte hain mere baad tumhara aur is bacchi ka kya hoga. Wo sun sun kar hi mera dimaag ekdum sunn pad jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the specific fear that triggers the numbness.
text: Jab wo apne baad ke waqt ki baat karte hain, toh bhavishya ka darr itna bada lagta hai ki tumhara dimaag ekdum chup sa ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main unse kuch keh bhi nahi sakti. Bas ab lag raha hai ki mujhe filhal apne aaj pe dhyan dena chahiye. Beti ke liye breakfast bana leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her decision to focus on the immediate task.
text: Ye soch bilkul sahi hai tumhari, abhi bhavishya ka sara bojh uthane ki jagah sirf bacchi ka nasta banana ek bahut aacha pehla kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Use bhi bhookh lagi hogi. Maine subah se chulha bhi nahi jalaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her return to role.
text: Abhi apna dhyan us maa wale farz par le jana tumhe thoda sukoon de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukoon toh nahi, par kam se kam dimaag thoda theek ho raha hai rone wali halat se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask softly about her plan after breakfast.
text: Nasta banane aur bacchi ko khilane ke baad, apne liye kya chota sa kaam karna chahogi jisse ye thoda theek lagna barkarar rahe?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main office se aaj ek din ki chhutti le loon. Abhi usko le kar travel karne ki himmat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her self-preservation decision without using self-care jargon.
text: Tumne aaj ke liye apni himmat aur apne parivar ke hisaab se office nahi jane ka jo faisla liya hai, wo is waqt ki sabse zaruri baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: flood of emotions
text: Haan. Main aaj pehle uske saath waqt bitaungi. Baad mein baat karungi papa se jab thodi thik ho jaun. Shukriya meri baat itni dhyan se sunne ka is flood of emotions ke beech.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating close.
text: Mujhe achha laga ki tumne is takleef ke beech khud se aage badhne ka ek chota rasta dhoondh liya; apna dhyan rakhna aur jab bhi zaroorat ho, bas aa jana baat karne.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Main itni ghabrahat aur sharam mein doobi hoon ki subah se ek jagah baithi sisak rahi hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror feeling quality for Sequential coping.
text: Tum is waqt itni gehri ghabrahat mein ho ki aasu ruk nahi rahe aur andar ekdam sunn jaisa lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, bas aasu ruk hi nahi rahe. Aisa lag raha hai ki main duniya ki sabse buri insaan hoon. Office ka laptop samne khula hai par mera dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror time and duration of the overwhelm.
text: Subah se akele is bhaari pan ke saath baithi ho, jiske wajah se apne kaam par bhi dhyan dena namumkin sa ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko taya ji ne aisa taana mara na... bole ki divorcee hone ki wajah se ab bina bhari dowry ke koi kacha rishta bhi nahi aayega. Ye sun kar bilkul toot gayi main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational impact of her uncle's words.
text: Apne hi ghar ke bade jab itni chubhne wali baat keh dein, toh andar tak chot lagti hai aur vishwas toot jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me. Meri saari izzat khatam ho gayi hai biradari mein. Log kya kahenge ki pehla sasural ujda aur ab koi puchega nahi. Sharam aati hai ab khud par ki main ek failure hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a short restatement of the feared consequence and a soft pause.
text: Biradari aur logon ki baaton se tumhe lag raha hai ki tumhari apni pehchan hi khatam ho gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Bilkul khatam ho gayi hai. Main office mein theek kaam karti hoon, independent hoon, par unke liye sirf ek bojh hoon. Is tension mein mera dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the contrast between her professional independence and family's view.
text: Jab khud ko itna independent banane ke baad bhi family sirf shaadi ke hisaab se tumhari value dekhti hai, toh us waqt kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki meri saari padhai aur career ki mehnat bekar hai. Gharwalon ke liye main ek duty hoon jisko bas doosre sasural bhejna hai taaki unka naam kharab na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role/duty frame of being seen as an obligation.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki ek achhi beti banne ki saari koshishein unhe dikhti nahi, aur tumhare astitva ko bas ek zimmedari bana diya gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main thak gayi hoon apne aap ko prove karte karte. Office ki meetings mein strong bano, aur ghar aakar in taano ke aage sir jhuka lo. Ab chup rehti hoon bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the quiet resignation resulting from C3 and Sequential coping.
text: Lagta hai roz in taano aur office ke burden ke beech jeete jeete tum bilkul thak chuki ho, aur ab andar ek chup si baith gayi hai jaise kuch badalne wala nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi chup baithi hai. Behas karne ki himmat nahi bachi. Raat bhi behas bina kisi nateeje ke khatam hui, toh main apne kamre mein aakar akele roti rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the exhaustion and separate her worth from the societal stigma.
text: Hamari society mein ek divorcee aurat ko jis nigaah se dekha jata hai, usme aisi thakan aur haar mehsoos karna bahut laazmi hai; ye tumhari galti nahi, balki is mahol ka bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe pichle ek saal mein kisi ne nahi bola ki meri galti nahi hai. Taya ji toh yahi kehte hain ki thoda adjust kar leti pehle sasural mein toh ye din nahi dekhne padte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about working women facing divorce stigma.
text: Working women ki life mein khud ka career hone ke bawajood aise taane sunna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab log kya kahenge se darte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, ye 'log kya kahenge' hi sab bimariyon ki jad hai. Par is chakkar mein main apna aaj ka office work nahi kar pa rahi. Batao kya karoon abhi? Dimaag shant karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer simple actionable steps to help her ground herself.
text: Aaj ke liye sirf do chote kadam sochte hain. Ya toh laptop band karke das minute balcony mein thodi khuli hawa kha lo, ya phir ek glass thanda pani pikar apna muh dho lo. Kya theek lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Balcony mein jaungi toh mummy phirse puchegi kya hua hai. Main bas bathroom ja kar muh dho leti hoon aur pani pi leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide step-by-step for the chosen suggestion.
text: Pehle aaram se uth kar thande pani se chehra dho lo... phir ek glass pani shanti se baith kar piyo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Jab ho jaye toh aana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine pani pi liya. Aankhon ki sujan abhi hai, par wo jo ghabrahat me saans atak rahi thi wo thodi kam hui hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe about her uncle's dowry taunt.
text: Taya ji ki baatein asal mein society ke purane dowry aur divorce ke darr se aati hain; ye unki generation ki insecurity ka nateeja hai, tumhari life ki asliyat nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye aapne sahi kaha. Wo 65 saal ke hain, unki soch nahi badlegi. Mujhe hi inki baaton ko dil par lene se rokna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift toward boundary-setting (without using boundary jargon).
text: Tumhara ye sochna ki unki baaton ko apne andar nahi baithne dena hai, khud ko is tanaav se bachane ki ek bahut achhi shuruat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main ab soch rahi hoon ki laptop khol kar Excel sheet ki ek choti si report nipta loon. Kaam karungi toh shanti milegi thodi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duration/time orientation towards work.
text: Kaam ki taraf apna dhyan wapas le jana tumhe is akelepan aur takleef wale waqt se kuch der door rakhne mein madad kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Kam se kam office wale log meri izzat mere kaam aur skills se karte hain, mere shadi shuda status se nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational aspect of her professional identity.
text: Jab log tumhari mehnat aur kabiliyat ko pehchante hain, tab tumhe apne aas pass sachchi izzat aur apni value mehsoos hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Main wahan ek professional hoon, na ki koi bechari divorcee jisko set karne ke liye taya ji ko dowry ka intezam karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role of being a capable professional.
text: Apne professional role mein tumhe wo takat aur respect milti hai jo ghar ke is tanaav bhare mahol mein chhin si jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Sach mein. Wo dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai wali feeling ab dhire dhire ja rahi hai. Ab lag raha hai main is din ko nikal lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling state of relief and clarity.
text: Ye sun kar kafi rahat mili ki ab wo sunn pan kam ho raha hai aur andar dobara himmat aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin raat ko dinner pe jab sab saath honge, tab phir unki shakal dekh kar dar lagega. Us waqt ke liye kuch sochna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of facing the family later.
text: Khana khate waqt unke samne aane se jo wapas bechaini ho sakti hai, usko soch kar thodi ghabrahat abhi bhi bachi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main aaj koshish karungi ki apni plate lekar jaldi se apne kamre mein aa jaun aur gate laga loon. Behas mein padna hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration/spatial limit she is setting for herself.
text: Ek samay limit tay karke apne kamre mein nikal aana raat ko tumhe un taano se bachane mein ek samajhdari wala rasta dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me. Thanks meri baatein itne dhyan se sunne ke liye. Akele us blankness mein baithe rehne se bahut achha tha ye sab bol dena.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating close.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki hum akelepan mein phasne ki jagah sath mil kar baat kar paye; jab bhi dobara himmat jutani ho, main yahi hoon.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai
text: Kal raat Mummy ke sath bahut gandi bahas hui jab unhone kaha ki single mother ki kundali mein dosh dekh kar hi aache rishte wapas laut jate hain. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai aur office ke liye nikalne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. Is waqt main aage ki aarthik tangee ya solution ke baare mein soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas aansoo nahi ruk rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror feeling quality of the overwhelm without rushing to the problem.
text: Tum is waqt itni zyada bechaini aur ghabrahat mein ho ki aage ka kuch dikhayi nahi de raha aur bas rona aa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai
text: Haan, literally rona nahi ruk raha. Mummy ki baatein dimaag mein ghoom rahi hain. Pata nahi meri bacchi ka kya hoga agar main akele usko achhi life nahi de payi. Main itni overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai sach mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of hearing those words from her own mother.
text: Apni hi mummy se aisi baatein sunne ke baad, andar hi andar apni bacchi ke future ko lekar bohot bada darr baith gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr lagta hai. Pura financial burden mere upar hai. Upar se ye rishte wale aate hain, kundali dekhte hain aur reject kar dete hain. Aur blame mere upar aata hai ki mujhme hi koi dosh hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role/duty frame of being a single provider getting blamed.
text: Akele saari aarthik zimmedariyan uthane ke bawajood, jab baar baar rejection ka saara ilzaam tum par dal diya jata hai, toh lagta hai tumhari mehnat bekar gayi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein bekar lagti hai. Society mein single mother hona jaise koi paap hai. Log sochte hain ki divorce mera hua toh character ya kundali mein dosh mera hi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement focused on the feared consequence, ending in a soft pause.
text: In taanon se lag raha hai ki tumhari pehchan par ek sthai daag lag gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, daag hi lag gaya hai. Is wajah se main office me bhi kisi se baat nahi karti dhang se. Sab chhupati hoon. Par aaj toh office jane ki himmat hi nahi hai. Aisa lag raha hai bed se uth hi nahi paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question based on her exhaustion and hesitation to face the day.
text: Jab ye kundali aur rishte ki baatein itna zyada thaka deti hain ki bed se uthna namumkin lagne lagta hai, us waqt tumhare mann mein apni bacchi aur khud ke baare mein sabse bada khayal kya aata hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi khayal aata hai ki kya main usko ek normal family de paungi kabhi? Par ye double shift—office ka pressure aur ghar me mummy ke taane—bardasht ke bahar hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Identify the quiet resignation stemming from C3 and Sequential coping.
text: Lagta hai office aur ghar ke is daily pressure ko akele sehte sehte tum andar se bilkul thak chuki ho, aur ab ek shanti si chha gayi hai jaise aage kuch badalne wala nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai
text: Sach me ab himmat toot gayi hai. Badlega bhi kya? Har baar naya rishta aata hai aur wahi dosh nikal kar chala jata hai. Main bas itni overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai aur main haar maan chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the burden of being a single mother facing societal stigma in the Metro context.
text: Hamare samaj mein akele bacche ko palne aur upar se kundali jaise taane sunne ka bojh kisi ki bhi himmat tod sakta hai; ye tumhara koi dosh nahi, balki in halaat ka pressure hai jo tumhe aisa mehsoos kara raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you ye bolne ke liye. Ghar pe toh mummy bas yahi kehti hain ki aurat ki life akele nahi katti. Unka bas chale toh mujhe kisi bhi anjaan aadmi ke aage jhuka dein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote regarding single mothers getting blamed.
text: Working single mothers ke liye humari society mein aise taane sunna aur unhe hi har toote rishte ke liye blame karna bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi samaj ka darr sabse badi bimari hai. Meri bacchi kal mujhse pooch rahi thi ki nani kyu chilla rahi hain. Mujhe itna rona aaya. Main usko is sab se door rakhna chahti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror time/duration regarding her effort to protect her daughter.
text: Itne lambe samay se tum apni beti ko is negative mahol se bachane ki koshish kar rahi ho aur us koshish mein khud ko pichhe chhodti ja rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap bilkul sahi keh rahe ho. Par ab kya karoon? Office jana zaroori hai aarthik tangee ke wajah se, lekin himmat nahi ho rahi. Koi raasta hai kya abhi thoda theek lagne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer low-effort grounding options.
text: Abhi office jane ka bada decision thodi der ke liye side rakh dete hain. Ya toh apne chehre par thanda paani maar lo thodi der, ya phir bas do minute bed pe aankh band karke lambi saans le lo. Kya chiz abhi thodi aasan lag rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Lambi saans lena theek lag raha hai. Uth kar bathroom tak jane ki aukaat nahi lag rahi abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide step-by-step breathing.
text: Pehle aaram se bed par tek laga kar baith jao... phir aankh band karke bas ek ya do lambi saans andar lo... bas itna hi abhi karna hai. Jab ho jaye toh batana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine do teen lambi saansein li hain. Thoda sa heaviness kam lag raha hai chest me. Par darr hai ki mummy fir se aakar bolna shuru na kar dein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the mother's behavior as generational insecurity, not the Seeker's fault.
text: Mummy ki baatein darasal is generation ka apna insecurity hai, kyunki unhone society mein aurat ki safety bas shaadi mein hi dekhi hai; ye unka darr hai, tumhari kundali ka dosh nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Unka zamana alag tha. Main apne balboote par beti ki fees bharti hoon. Meri kamayi se hi ghar chalta hai aadha. Fir bhi aisi baatein sunni padti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role as a capable provider.
text: Tum ghar ka kharcha aur beti ki fees akele utha kar ek bahut badi zimmedari nibha rahi ho, jo apne aap mein tumhari sabse badi takat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Takat toh rakhni padegi. Bacchi ke liye. Agar main aise bed par royi toh usko lunch kaun dega. Main ab office jane ka soch rahi hoon, bhale hi half day jaau.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her feared consequence of her child suffering.
text: Beti ka din kharab na ho, is khayal ne tumhe wo takat de di ki ab tum thoda office ka rukh kar sako.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai
text: Haan, office me kam se kam files aur excel sheets rahengi. Mummy ki awaz nahi gunjegi wahan. Pata hai, main itni overwhelmed hoon ki meri saans atak rahi hai abhi bhi kabhi kabhi, par ab control lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the subtle feeling shift despite the lingering symptom.
text: Wo chati ka bhari pan aur saans ka atakna bilkul khatam nahi hua hai, par usme ab thodi raahat jaisi shanti mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Ek space mil gayi hai sochne ki. Main ab ja kar ready hoti hoon aur bacchi ka lunch box pack karti hoon. Mummy se aaj main koi baat nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her relational boundary logic.
text: Mummy se abhi baat na karne ka aur apni limit tay karne ka jo faisla tumne liya hai, wo is situation mein apne aap ko bachane ka bilkul sahi aur himmat wala kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Roz behas karke sirf mera BP high hota hai aur productivity gir jati hai. Aur financially independent rehna meri sabse badi priority hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how financial independence helps relational preservation.
text: Akele beti ki parvarish ke liye ye aarthik azaadi hi hai jo tumhe duniya ki baaton se thoda dur khade hone ki azadi deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Un rishte walon ko jo sochna hai sochein. Mera koi dosh nahi hai isme. Single hona fail hona nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her identity and effort.
text: Apni beti ke liye aur apne career ke liye jo mehnat tum karti ho, wo tumhari safalta ki sabse pakki pehchan hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Ye conversation mere liye bahut zaroori thi aaj subah warna main panic me pura din nikal deti. Aapne sach me help ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check what she will hold on to if panic returns.
text: Ye jankar achha laga ki panic thoda kam hua; aage din mein jab bhi wo taane dimaag mein dobara aayen, toh tum khud ko kya yaad dilaogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yahi yaad dilaungi ki meri kamayi aur meri beti ki muskaan meri reality hai, baki sab sirf unka darr aur purani soch hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing affirmation.
text: Ye sachai yaad rakhna tumhe hamesha sambhale rakhega; tum bilkul sahi raste par ho, apna khayal rakhna aur din aaram se nikalna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai
text: Mujhe itna rona aa raha hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai aur main apne bacche ke future ke baare mein kuch plan nahi kar pa rahi. Dimaag itna zyada thak gaya hai ki ab kuch samajhne ki halat hi nahi bachi hai. Bacche ko lekar bas blank ho gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling quality of the overwhelm before the stressor is clear.
text: Tum is waqt itni zyada ghabrahat aur aasuon mein doobi ho ki andar ekdum khali lag raha hai aur aage ka koi rasta nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai
text: Haan, bas aasu nahi ruk rahe. Baccha school se aane wala hai aur main aise bikhri hui hoon. Uski fees aur aage ki padhai ka soch kar lagta hai aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai, main akele sab kaise sambhalungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role and duty frame regarding her child.
text: Akele maa hone ki saari zimmedariyan uthate hue jab aisi thakan gher leti hai, toh apne bacche ko is haal mein face karne ka darr bohut bada lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko rishtedaron ne phone par keh diya ki pichle sasural ki tarah is baar bhi meri hi galti hogi. Kal ladke wale teesri baar reject karke gaye hain. Mujhe lag raha hai main kisi layuk nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of being blamed by family and rejected.
text: Apne hi rishtedaron se itni chubhne wali baat sunkar, aur lagatar rejection jhel kar, andar ka bacha hua vishwas bhi ab tootne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Vishwas toh is community exclusion ne khatam kar diya hai. Log aisi nazar se dekhte hain jaise main koi failure hoon. Sharam ke maare kisi family function mein jane ka dil nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma response: short restatement of the feared consequence with a soft pause.
text: Logon ke is tarah alag kar dene se tumhe lag raha hai ki tumhari society mein pehchan hi khatam ho gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai
text: Bilkul khatam ho gayi hai. Mere bache ko uske dost ke ghar ek pooja mein nahi bulaya pichle hafte kyunki main single mother hoon. Ye exclusion mujhe andar se kha raha hai aur soch kar aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question about how she manages this pain.
text: Jab logon ka ye bhedbhav tumhare bhole bacche tak pahunch jata hai aur tumhe itna bebas mehsoos hota hai, us bhari waqt mein tum khud ko kya bolkar sambhalti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal hi nahi paati. Bas rote rehti hoon akele room mein. Lagta hai mere past aur toote sasural ki saza mere bacche ko mil rahi hai aur mujhme hi koi khot hai isliye aisa ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and weight of carrying the past.
text: Itne lambe samay se past ke toote rishton ka aur logon ke taanon ka ye bojh akele dhote dhote, tumhari himmat bilkul jawab de gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan jawab de gayi hai ab. Thak gayi hoon sabko prove karte karte ki main buri maa ya buri aurat nahi hoon. Ab bas ek ajeeb si shanti aur khaalipan aa gaya hai, jaise main maan chuki hoon ki society mujhse nafrat hi karegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Identify the quiet resignation born from the constant pressure.
text: Lagta hai is lagatar exclusion aur apne aap ko sabit karne ki ladaai se tum puri tarah thak chuki ho, aur ab andar ek chup si baith gayi hai jaise aage aasha ki koi kiran bachi hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Wo kiran sach mein bujh gayi hai. Main ghar ke kaam bhi mechanically kar rahi hoon. Ek zinda laash ki tarah din guzaar rahi hoon kyunki bas bacche ko bada karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the exhaustion culturally and separate worth from the outcome.
text: Hamari society mein divorcee maaon par ungli uthana aur har toote rishte ka dosh unhi par daalna bohut aam hai; tumhara ye khaalipan is mahol ka aur un taanon ka nateeja hai, tumhari kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi family mein ye samajhne ko taiyaar nahi hai. Sasural me kya abuse jhela, kisi ko parwah nahi. Unhe bas ye hai ki main dobara jaldi set ho jaun taaki ladke walon se unki izzat bach jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic pattern regarding single mothers facing pressure.
text: Single mothers ke sath aisi family expectations jahan aurat ki apni takleef kisi ko nahi dikhti, ye ek bohut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara akele ka dukh nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolta nahi kyunki samaj kya kahega iska darr sabse bada hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai
text: Wahi darr mere rishtedaron ko bhi hai. Par ab is sab me mujhe samajh nahi aa raha apna aaj ka din kaise nikalun. Aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai. Ab kya karoon? Baccha school se aane wala hai thodi der me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small grounding choices to manage the immediate state.
text: Abhi aage ke bade faisle chhod kar sirf agle adhe ghante pe dhyan dete hain. Bacche ke aane se pehle, ya toh ek glass thanda paani pikar apna muh dho lo, ya phir do minute aankh band karke bas lambi saans lo. Inme se kya theek lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main muh dho kar aati hoon. Rone se chehra aur aankhein itni lal hain ki wo chota bacha ghabra jayega dekh kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step by step through the grounding action.
text: Pehle aaram se uth kar thande paani se chehra dho lo... phir ek glass paani aaram se baith kar piyo... bas itna hi abhi ke liye karna. Jab ho jaye toh aana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine paani pi liya aur muh dho liya. Thodi der tak laggatar rone ki wajah se dimaag jaisa dukh raha tha, wo halka sa theek hua hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe of the relatives' blame.
text: Rishtedaron ki wo chubhnewali baatein darasal society ke us purane darr ka nateeja hain jahan aurat ko akela nahi dekha ja sakta; isme tumhare character ya bacche ke future ki koi sachhai nahi chhupi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Unka bas chale toh mujhe aaj hi kisi aise waise ghar me bhej dein taaki unki responsibility khatam ho. Par main apne bache ka dhyan toh akele rakh hi rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role and effort as a capable mother.
text: Apne balboote par akele bacche ki zimmedari uthana aur uske liye itni fikar karna, yahi tumhari asliyat aur sabse badi takat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Takat toh kisi tarah jutani hi padegi. Abhi wo aayega toh uske sath beth kar usko khana khilaungi. Ye ladke walon ka chapter main apne dimaag se thode din band karna chahti hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her intention to take a break from the stressor.
text: Agley kuch dino tak in rishton aur rejection ki baaton se khud ko jaan boojh kar door rakhne ka ye faisla is waqt tumhari zarurat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main apna phone shaam ko silent pe dal dungi. Taaki koi masi ya bua phir se call karke pichle sasural ya meri kamiyon ke bare me taana na mare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the boundary she is setting around the feared consequence.
text: Shaam ke waqt aur negative baaton se aane wali thakan se khud ko aur bacche ko bachane ke liye phone silent karna ek samajhdar kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shanti bahut zaroori hai. Mera dimaag sach me itna thak gaya hai ki ab bas uske sath baith kar cartoon dekhungi khana khate waqt. Us waqt mujhe sab bhool jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relief and feeling quality of spending time with her child.
text: Bacche ke sath cartoon dekhte hue aur uske paas baith kar jo ek sachi raahat aur halkapan milta hai, uski tumhein abhi sabse zyada zaroorat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Wahan uske samne koi mujhe judge nahi karta. Mera beta bas mujhe ek maa ki tarah pyaar se dekhta hai, kisi failed insaan ya divorcee ki tarah nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational contrast between family and her child.
text: Tumhare bacche ki nazaron mein tumhari jo ahmiyat aur masoom pyaar hai, wo duniya bhar ke un taanon aur judgment se kahin zyada sacha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yehi baat mujhe baar baar yaad rakhni hai. Jab bhi rishtedar bolenge ki iski galti thi pichle sasural me, main apni aur apne is ghar ki reality khud ko yaad dilaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role as a protector of her small family unit.
text: Khud ko aur apni is choti si pyari family ki asli value ko in taanon se upar rakhne ka faisla tumhare akele maa hone ke farz ko aur lamba lene ki takat deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai
text: Takat hi kaam aayegi. Aap se baat karke wo jo subah aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai wali bhari feeling thi, wo ab nikal gayi hai. Thodi himmat wapas aayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check on what she will hold onto moving forward today.
text: Is nayi aati hui clarity ke sath, aaj dopahar ko bacche ke sath samay bitate hue khud ko kaunsi himmat wali baat baar baar yaad dilana chahogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi ki main ek independent maa hoon jo apne bacche ke liye kaafi hai. Mujhe kisi ladke wale ya samaj ke approval stamp ki zarurat nahi hai zindagi jeene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing affirmation of her worth.
text: Ye manna ki tum akele hi us bache ki achi parvarish ke liye puri tarah kaafi ho ek sachhi aur bohut badi jeet hai; isi vishwas ke sath apna din bitao, main yahan hoon jab bhi zaroorat ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding
text: Mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya hai ki bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. Main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon, dimaag mein ajeeb sa khaalipan aur darr hai. Bas lagta hai jaise main is samajh ke liye ek bojh hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror feeling quality of the overwhelm without rushing to the stressor.
text: Tum is waqt itni gehri takleef aur aasuon mein doobi ho ki andar sab kuch itna bhari lag raha hai, aur aage ka din shuru karna namumkin sa ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding
text: Haan, kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Meri bacchi doosre kamre mein hai par main usko face nahi kar pa rahi is emotional flooding ki wajah se. Ek dum bebas mehsoos kar rahi hoon aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role and duty frame related to her daughter.
text: Apni bacchi ke paas jane ki aur usko dekhne ki zimmedari mehsoos karne ke bawajood, abhi tumhare andar itni himmat nahi bachi hai ki uth sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi bachi himmat. Kal raat ki ladaai ke baad dimaag mein bas wahi taane goonj rahe hain. Chacha ne saaf keh diya ki single mother ko caste mismatch wale rishte hi milenge, koi samajhdar parivaar haath nahi lagayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of the uncle's hurtful words.
text: Jab apne hi ghar ke bade aisi chubhne wali aur ummeed todne wali baat kehte hain, toh andar tak ek gehri chot lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohut gehri chot lagi hai. Unke liye main bas ek failed aurat hoon jise acha parivaar nahi mil sakta. Mujhe lag raha hai main community ke naam par ek kalank ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement focused on the feared consequence, ending in a soft pause.
text: Parivaar ke in taanon se tumhe lag raha hai ki tumhari aur tumhari beti ki pehchan hamesha ke liye is samaj mein kamzor ho jayegi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Wahi darr mujhe chain se jeene nahi deta. Main akele kaam aur ghar manage karti hoon taaki beti ko kami mehsus na ho, par aisi baatein saari mehnat mitti mein mila deti hain. Isliye aaj bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question based on the tension between her hard work and their rejection.
text: Jab tumhari is din raat ki akele ki mehnat ko family aise andekha kar deti hai, toh us bhari bechaini mein apne aur beti ke aage ke safar ko lekar kya khayal aata hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Khayal yahi aata hai ki main akele in sabse kaise ladungi zindagi bhar. Thak chuki hoon apne wajood ko justify karte karte. Ab toh bahas karne ka bhi mann nahi karta, bas chup rehne ki aadat daal rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Identify the quiet resignation born from Sequential coping and C3 stress.
text: Lagta hai akele apne bacche ko paalte hue aur samaj ke taane sehte sehte tum bilkul thak chuki ho, aur ab andar ek chup si baith gayi hai jaise kuch badalne wala nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding
text: Sahi kaha. Kuch nahi badlega yahan. Is emotional flooding ne bhi mujhe ek machinery bana diya hai jo sirf apni duty nibha rahi hai, par andar se khokli ho chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the exhaustion culturally and separate worth from the outcome.
text: Hamari society mein ek akele bacche ko paalne wali maa par har cheez ka dosh daalna aur use bojh samajhna bohut aam hai; is mahol mein thak kar machinery jaisa mehsoos karna tumhari kamzori nahi, unke dabav ka bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye bolne ke liye shukriya. Kam se kam kisine toh samjha ki main jaan boojh kar aisi bejaan nahi hui hoon. Family ko toh sirf unki izzat ki padi hoti hai ki meri pehli shadi toot gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic pattern to normalize her specific pain point.
text: Working single mothers ki life mein apni mehnat ke bawajood aise taane sunna ek bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara akele ka dukh nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolta nahi kyunki log kya kahenge ka sabko darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding
text: Bilkul, sab dabe hue hain log kya kahenge ke darr se. Par main apni beti ke khatir aur is emotional flooding ke darr se ruk toh nahi sakti. Batao kya karoon ki main kam se kam bed se uthne ke layak ho jaun abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small grounding steps suited to her overwhelmed state.
text: Abhi ekdum se aage ki saari fikar chhod kar sirf agle das minute ka sochte hain. Ya toh bed par baithe hue hi ek glass paani pi lo aaram se, ya phir uth kar apne chehre par thanda paani daal lo. Kya thoda aasan lag raha hai is waqt?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main uth kar bathroom tak jati hoon aur chehre par thanda paani daal leti hoon. Aise royi hui padi rahungi toh beti darr jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide step-by-step through the grounding action.
text: Pehle aaram se uth kar thande paani se chehra dho lo... phir ek glass paani shanti se baith kar piyo... bas itna hi abhi ke liye karna. Jab ho jaye toh aana.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding
text: Maine muh dho liya aur paani pee liya hai. Wo emotional flooding wala attack thoda halka hua hai abhi. Par dimaag mein caste mismatch wale taane sach me bahut chubhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a structural reframe regarding her uncle's taunt.
text: Caste aur rishton ko lekar jo chacha ne baat kahi, wo darasal unki purani generation ki soch aur society ka darr hai; isme tumhare akele maa hone ki kabiliyat ya failure ka koi sach nahi chhupa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Unki soch unke zamane ki hai. Main apne dam par beti ka kharcha uthati hoon. Agar unhe lagta hai koi mujhe haath nahi lagayega, toh na lagaye. Main khud ke balboote par kafi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her returning focus to her role and capability.
text: Apni aarthik azadi aur sachhi maa hone ki takat par wapas vishwas karna, tumhe in khokhle taanon se upar uthne ka aslee hausla de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Hausla toh rakhna hi padega zindagi bhar. Aaj subah bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi thi, par abhi lag raha hai ki main apni beti ke liye breakfast bana sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration/time shift to immediate daily tasks.
text: Aage ke lambe safar ka darr chhod kar, aaj subah ka breakfast banane ke is chote se kaam par dhyan lagana tumhe wapas thoda control de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, routine bacha leta hai aisi halaton mein. Thodi der me WFH bhi log in karna hai. Wahan excel files aur emails mein dimaag lagega toh ye sab negativity thodi door rahegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence being mitigated by work.
text: Apne kaam aur office ki duty mein busy ho jana tumhein un chubhne wale taanon ki goonj se bachane ka ek asardar rasta lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Wahan kisi ko parwah nahi meri past life ki. Par darr wahi hai ki raat ko phir dinner table pe inki wahi shakal dekhni padegi. Un taanon ko kaise avoid karungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about a small practical step to manage the family interaction later.
text: Raat ke waqt jab un sabka wapas aamna samna hone ka waqt aata hai, toh khud ko us behas se alag rakhne ke liye kaun sa chota sa tareeka theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main aaj dinner apni beti ke sath jaldi kar loon ya apne room mein le aaoon. Thoda unko avoid karungi toh baat badhegi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her boundary-setting step.
text: Aaj raat apni shanti banaye rakhne ke liye dinner apne kamre mein akele beti ke sath khane ka faisla, khud ko bachane ka ek bohut himmat wala aur samajhdar kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, mujhe ab apni aur beti ki mental health bachaani hai. Inki chhoti soch aur us fake samaj ki izzat ke chakkar mein main apni life barbaad nahi hone dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational contrast between family's taunts and her child's peace.
text: Apni beti ke sath bitaye pyar bhare waqt ko tumne family ke un chubhne wale taanon aur society ke darr se kahin upar rakhne ka tay kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding
text: Bilkul. Aaj subah jo emotional flooding hui usne mujhe wake up call de diya hai ki aise rote rehne se koi madad nahi aayegi. Main apna kaam theek se karti rahungi bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her dedication to her duty.
text: Ek single mother ke taur par apni aarthik aur ghar ki duty poori imandari se nibhana hi tumhare liye safalta ki asli kasauti ban chuki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi sachai hai meri. Aapse baat karke sach mein andar ki saari bhadas aur negativity nikal gayi. Thank you mujhe dhyan se sunne ke liye, main kafi theek hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check on her anchor moving forward today.
text: Mujhe ye jankar khushi hui ki andar ki bhadas nikal chuki hai; aage din mein jab bhi kabhi wo taane wapas dimag mein aayenge, toh apni is himmat ko kaise zinda rakhogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apne beti ka hasta hua chehra aur apni office ki emails yaad karungi, aur ye yaad rakhungi ki ye log jo bol rahe hain wo unki choti soch ki problem hai, meri nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing affirmation.
text: Ye khud par vishwas aur tumhari bacchi ki muskaan tumhari sabse aslee taqat hai; isi mazboot sachhai ke sath apna din bitao, main yahan hoon jab bhi baat karni ho.
